title: Delya Ghosh | Partner | BAL
content:
## Partner // San Francisco
“I love being able to make a difference in both a corporate environment and a person’s life. … I am proud of the constant innovation that’s part of our DNA here at BAL.”
Delya is a partner in the San Francisco office of BAL. She offers a breadth of corporate and family-based immigration experience, and she serves clients of all sizes in industries such as financial services, biotechnology, retail and technology. Delya offers strategic counsel on all aspects of corporate immigration law, regulation, policy and compliance, including nonimmigrant visas, permanent residence, naturalization, I-9, LCA compliance and corporate restructuring. Delya is committed to providing tailor-made counsel and superior service to clients. Recognized by Best Lawyers, Delya speaks and writes about corporate immigration issues for professional audiences. She is a member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association.
Santa Clara University, J.D. The University of California at Berkeley, B.A., Political Science and Women’s Studies
English, Bengali (conversational)
State Bar of California
